Exclusive Production

Performance

Beyond
the Limit

The DE DARK is not merely a machine — it is a philosophy rendered in carbon fibre and raw velocity. Every surface serves a purpose. Every curve conceals a calculated force.

Kai Studio has obsessed over each millimetre: from the lightning-bolt daytime running lights that carve through the night, to the sculpted rear diffuser that pins the car to the asphalt at 300 km/h.

Design Language
